reference.intro: Upload a photo of someone with the hairstyle you want. The AI will copy the cut, length, colour, and texture onto your selfie.
reference.unsupportedFormat: Unsupported format. Please use JPEG, PNG, or WebP.
reference.tooLarge: Image is too large. Try a smaller photo.
reference.processing: Could not process this image. Try another one.
reference.dropHint: Drop a photo here, or click to choose
reference.sizeHint: JPEG, PNG, WebP — up to 2 MB (after resize)

modeSelector.ariaLabel: How would you like to choose a hairstyle?

reference.label: Reference
reference.description: Upload a photo to copy from

customPrompt.label: Describe the hairstyle you want
customPrompt.help: Mention length, colour, texture, and any details.
placeholders: Medium-length wavy bob with copper highlights and a side-swept fringe
Short pixie cut, platinum blonde, slightly tousled
Long layered hair with curtain bangs, warm chestnut brown
Shoulder-length curls, deep auburn, with a soft middle parting

result.shareTextGeneric: Tried a new hairstyle on StyleMe
result.title: Your new look

QUOTA_EXCEEDED.title: No credits left
QUOTA_EXCEEDED.body: You've used all your free generations for today. Watch an ad to earn more, or come back tomorrow.

RATE_LIMITED.title: Too fast
RATE_LIMITED.body: Please wait a moment before trying again.

UPSTREAM_FAILED.title: Generation failed
UPSTREAM_FAILED.body: The AI service had trouble processing your image. Please try again.

VALIDATION_FAILED.title: Invalid request
VALIDATION_FAILED.body: Please check your image and try again.

INVALID_IMAGE.title: Invalid image
INVALID_IMAGE.body: This image cannot be processed. Try a different photo with a clear view of the face.

FILE_TOO_LARGE.title: Image too large
FILE_TOO_LARGE.body: Please use an image smaller than 10 MB. We'll resize it for you.

UNSUPPORTED_MIME.title: Unsupported format
UNSUPPORTED_MIME.body: Please use a JPEG, PNG, or WebP image.

UNAUTHORIZED.title: Session expired
UNAUTHORIZED.body: Please refresh the page to continue.

AD_SESSION_INVALID.title: Ad session expired
AD_SESSION_INVALID.body: The ad session is invalid or expired. Please watch the ad again.

AD_CAP_REACHED.title: Daily ad limit reached
AD_CAP_REACHED.body: You've watched the maximum number of ads for today. Come back tomorrow for more!

rewards.comingSoonTitle: Coming soon — watch ads to earn extra generations
rewards.comingSoonAriaLabel: Watch ad for credit — coming soon
rewards.adsUnavailable: Ads are unavailable right now. Please try again later.
rewards.watchAdAriaLabel: Watch an ad to earn one extra generation

devModal.fakeVideoText: Imagine a riveting ad about hair products

rewards.claimFailedToast: Could not claim the reward. Please try again.

upload.subtitle: Upload a clear photo of your face and try on 40+ AI hairstyles.
upload.invalidFile: Please choose an image file (JPEG, PNG, or WebP).
upload.dropHint: Drop a photo or click to choose
upload.sizeHint: JPEG, PNG or WebP · up to 10 MB
upload.privacy: Your photo stays on your device until you start a generation. We don't store it after the result is delivered.

history.title: History
history.emptyBody: Upload a photo and try a hairstyle — it'll appear here.
